project_type: Next.js 14 static site with Azure Functions API and ML pipeline
build_system: pnpm for frontend, npm for API
test_framework: No tests yet - linting via next lint
verification_instructions: Run 'pnpm build' in frontend/ to confirm static export succeeds with all 13 routes compiled
setup_instructions: cd frontend && pnpm install && pnpm build
environment_constraints: Node v22.22.3 with pnpm available. No Docker. Static export mode means all data must be embedded at build time.
contribution_requirements: Dark theme maintained. Indonesian text where appropriate. Static data fallback pattern preserved.
key_patterns: frontend/lib/static-data.ts contains all static fallback data as exported constants. Components use useState initialized with static data, then attempt API fetch. ml/data/knowledge_base/location_profiles.json has all 595 location profiles with coordinates, scores, infrastructure, and cluster info. Cluster names in static-data.ts use 'Suburban Growth Hub' (id=2) and 'Transitional Developing' (id=4) but knowledge-base.ts still uses old names 'Urban Digital Leaders (2)' and 'High-Risk Underserved (4)' from the original ML output.
directory_structure: frontend/ - Next.js 14 app with app router. api/ - Azure Functions TS. ml/ - notebooks and data. docs/ - Architecture and Azure guides.
